headline: Dutch warship transits Taiwan Strait; PLA warns, as Sino-European tensions rise. Markets fall.
headline_zh: 荷兰军舰过航台海 解放军警告 市场连跌
narrative: The day's most significant development is the Dutch frigate 'De Ruyter' transiting the Taiwan Strait and its helicopter intruding into Xisha territorial airspace, prompting a rare public rebuke from the PLA Eastern Theater Command. This incident underscores escalating military friction between China and European navies, as the Netherlands aligns more closely with US-led freedom of navigation operations. Meanwhile, the anti-corruption drive continues with the expulsion of former Chengdu mayor Wang Fengchao, signaling persistent high-level discipline. Markets reflect underlying anxiety: the SSE Composite fell 1.38%, and foreign broker JPMorgan warned that Hong Kong-listed internet firms have yet to see a performance turnaround. The cocktail of geopolitical pushback, domestic political tightening, and economic headwinds points to a challenging period ahead.
narrative_zh: 今日最突出的动态是荷兰‘德鲁伊特’号护卫舰过航台湾海峡，其舰载直升机侵入西沙领空，东部战区罕见公开警告。这一事件突显中国与欧洲海军之间军事摩擦升级，荷兰正更紧密配合美国主导的航行自由行动。同时，反腐败行动持续推进，成都原市长王凤朝被开除党籍，表明高层纪律仍保持高压。市场反映潜在焦虑：上证综指下跌1.38%，摩根大通警告港股互联网公司业绩拐点尚未到来。地缘政治反弹、国内政治收紧与经济逆风交织，预示未来一段挑战期。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4027.736 ▼1.38% · Shenzhen Component 15314.7 ▼2.48% · ChiNext 3957.935 ▼3.20% · USD/CNY 6.765 ▼0.12% · USD/CNH 6.7839 ▲0.16%

top_stories.english_title: Shanghai Men's Basketball wins CBA championship, first title since 2002
top_stories.why_it_matters: A feel-good sports story with limited political signal; reflects normal public entertainment amid tense news flow.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 一则体育喜讯，政治信号有限；反映紧张新闻流中的正常公众娱乐。
top_stories.pull_quote: Shanghai beat Zhejiang Guangsha 103-82 in Game 5 to claim the title 4-1.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 上海队103-82战胜浙江广厦，总比分4-1夺冠。

top_stories.primary_title: 习近平同通伦举行会谈
top_stories.english_title: Xi Jinping holds talks with Lao leader Thongloun Sisoulith in Beijing
top_stories.why_it_matters: Reaffirms close China-Laos ties under the 'Community with a Shared Future' framework, a key diplomatic win amid strained relations with the West.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 重申中老‘命运共同体’框架下的紧密关系，是在对西方关系紧张背景下的关键外交得分。
top_stories.pull_quote: Xi emphasized jointly advancing the China-Laos Community with a Shared Future.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 习近平强调共同推进中老命运共同体建设。

top_stories.primary_title: 荷兰军舰过航台湾海峡 东部战区发声
top_stories.english_title: Dutch warship transits Taiwan Strait; PLA Eastern Theater Command warns
top_stories.why_it_matters: First public acknowledgment by PLA of a Dutch naval intrusion; signals expanding European naval presence in the region, raising risks of miscalculation.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 解放军首次公开确认荷兰海军侵入；表明欧洲海军在该区域存在扩大，增加误判风险。
top_stories.pull_quote: PLA stated the Dutch helicopter illegally intruded into Xisha territorial airspace.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 解放军称荷兰直升机非法侵入西沙领空。

top_stories.primary_title: 四川省成都市委原副书记、原市长王凤朝严重违纪违法被开除党籍和公职
top_stories.english_title: Former Chengdu Mayor Wang Fengchao expelled from Party and public office for serious discipline violations
top_stories.why_it_matters: Continues pattern of high-profile anti-corruption cases in major cities, signaling the Party's ongoing internal cleansing despite economic pressures.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 延续大城市高官反腐态势，表明党在经济压力下仍持续内部清洗。
top_stories.pull_quote: Wang was found to have 'seriously violated Party discipline' and engaged in bribery.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 王被指‘严重违反党的纪律’，搞权钱交易。

top_stories.primary_title: 公安机关、教育部门提醒考生诚信赴考
top_stories.english_title: Public security, education departments remind candidates to take exams honestly for Gaokao 2026
top_stories.why_it_matters: Routine annual pre-Gaokao warning; underscores state sensitivity to exam cheating, but no new policy signal.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 一年一度的高考考前提醒；凸显国家对考试舞弊的高度关注，但无新政策信号。
top_stories.pull_quote: Ministry of Public Security vowed to crack down on exam-related crimes to ensure 2026 Gaokao security.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 公安部誓言严打涉考犯罪，确保2026年高考安全。

top_stories.primary_title: 2026年人工智能技术赋能网络安全应用测试公告
top_stories.english_title: 2026 AI technology empowering cybersecurity testing application announcement
top_stories.why_it_matters: Part of ongoing regulatory push to integrate AI into national security infrastructure; signals official embrace of AI for monitoring and defense.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 持续推动AI融入国家安全基础设施的监管举措；表明官方支持AI用于监控和防御。
top_stories.pull_quote: The announcement calls for applications from cybersecurity firms to test AI-driven security solutions.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 公告邀请网络安全企业测试AI驱动的安全解决方案。

top_stories.primary_title: 【市场洞察】摩根大通：港股互联网公司业绩拐点未现 A股仍具备上行空间
top_stories.english_title: JPMorgan says no performance turning point for Hong Kong internet firms; A-share still has upside
top_stories.why_it_matters: Skeptical foreign broker view on Chinese tech earnings recovery; contrasts with domestic optimism, reinforcing investor caution.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 外资投行对中国科技股盈利复苏持怀疑态度；与国内乐观情绪形成对比，加剧投资者审慎。
top_stories.pull_quote: JPMorgan analysts noted that most HK-listed internet companies have yet to report a clear inflection point in earnings.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 摩根大通分析师指出，多数港股互联网公司尚未报告明确的盈利拐点。

top_stories.primary_title: 教育部：推动录取通知书回归一页纸
top_stories.english_title: Ministry of Education promotes returning admission letters to one page
top_stories.why_it_matters: Minor administrative move to reduce paper waste; no policy or strategic significance.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 减少纸张浪费的行政微调；无政策或战略意义。
top_stories.pull_quote: The Ministry encourages universities to simplify admission letters and avoid excessive packaging.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 教育部鼓励高校简化录取通知书，避免过度包装。

top_stories.primary_title: 力合科创战略入局！星灿智能集齐三大产业资本，领跑家用具身智能赛道
top_stories.english_title: Leaguer invests in Star Smart; company leads home embodied AI track
top_stories.why_it_matters: Signals continued capital inflow into domestic embodied AI startups, with backing from state-linked industrial capital.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 表明国内具身智能初创企业继续获得资本注入，且有国有产业资本支持。
top_stories.pull_quote: Star Smart now has three major industrial investors: Leaguer, [others], aiming to lead the home service robot market.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 星灿智能已集齐三大产业资本：力合等，目标领跑家用服务机器人市场。

top_stories.primary_title: PwC cuts partner payouts in China Evergrande fallout
top_stories.english_title: PwC cuts partner payouts in China Evergrande fallout
top_stories.why_it_matters: Direct consequence of regulatory scrutiny after Evergrande scandal; signals tightening of foreign auditor accountability in China.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 恒大丑闻后监管审查的直接后果；表明中国对外资审计师问责趋严。
top_stories.pull_quote: PwC is reducing partner distributions by 10-20% amid the Evergrande audit probe.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 普华永道在恒大审计调查中削减合伙人分配10%-20%。

top_stories.primary_title: The US-China decoupling fantasy, with Jessica Chen Weiss
top_stories.english_title: FT podcast: The US-China decoupling fantasy with Jessica Chen Weiss
top_stories.why_it_matters: Academic perspective arguing that decoupling is exaggerated; provides nuanced view popular in Western policy circles, but no new factual data.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 学者观点认为脱钩被夸大；提供西方政策圈流行但无新事实数据的细致视角。
top_stories.pull_quote: Weiss argues that the US-China relationship remains deeply intertwined despite political tensions.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: Weiss认为尽管政治紧张，美中关系仍深度交织。
